name: Wilmoore
job:
I am the chief
guard in the
village of Paws!
answer1:
Paws is a great
village and we
keep it safe!
answer2:
Pirates come
from an isle to
the east!
question:
Dost thou
mean to
cause trouble?

name: Francesca
answer1:
I saw the way ya
dealt with ol'
Red Eye!
question:
Ya haven't come
to steal a horse
I hope?
yes:
Well the master
ain't gonna like
that much!
no:
Then must be
to see Smith!

name: Sven
answer1:
Wit' my axe, I
can chop'm down
quick, ya.
question:
Art ya a
lumberjack?

name: Zair the Wise
answer2:
A three part key
and a word of
passage are
needed to enter
the chamber. Ask
my brother
beyond Lock Lake
of the word!
question: Seen it?

name: Sal
job:
I am the barmaid
I serve the ale!
answer1:
We have the
finest brew in
Britannia!
answer2:
We serve only
Folley on tap!
question:
Dost thou
favor Folley?
yes:
A great mug if I
may say so!

name: Jingles
job:
I seek the
wisdom of magic.
answer1:
My master knows
the gate travel
spell!
question:
Dost thou
know him?
no:
He lives in a
hidden village
in Lock Lake
reachable only
by ship, ask of
the gate spell!

name: Sir Hobie
health:
Tired and
hungry but
always faithful.
answer2:
My quest is to
defeat the evils
of the world.
question:
'tis thy
quest also?

name: Damsel
job:
I am here to
buy food.
answer1:
Yes, I hear they
have the best
rations here.
question:
Dost thou travel
in the depths?
yes:
In the great
castle there is
a secret
entrance!

name: Wheatpin
answer1:
Around there in
the nook of the
mountains!
question:
Art thou looking
for something?

name: Barren
answer2:
Search the
hills in the
south-east
corner of town!
question: Art thou dim?

name: Sir Simon
answer2:
Mystics can be
found by an
eight parts
avatar!
question:
Hast thou
attained
enlightenment in
all eight
virtues?
yes:
The mystic
armour lies in
the center of
the oak grove!

name: Lady Tessa
answer2:
Mystics can be
found by an
eight parts
avatar!
question:
Hast thou
attained
enlightenment in
all eight
virtues?
yes:
The mystic
weapons lie in
the training
room of Serpent
castle!

name: Asemly
job:
I am here to
serve thee.
answer1:
Well, I can
dance and sing!
question:
Does that
interest thee?
no:
Well then, I
guess I'm no
help at all
then.

name: Little Jon
answer1:
Britannia is a
land so fair,
to other lands I
would not dare!
answer2:
I hope someday
thou may return!
question:
I hear that thou
art from another
world?
